summary: Comprehensive testing of Chat/Messaging and Payment Document Validation features. All backend tests passed (11/12, 1 skipped). All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/messages retrieves messages sorted by created_at
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/messages sends message as employer
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/messages sends message as actuary
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/messages rejects empty messages (400)
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/messages rejects whitespace-only messages (400)
Backend: PUT /api/marketplace/quotes/{id}/pay rejects payment when no employer_documents (400)
Backend: Document upload endpoint works correctly
Backend: Uploaded documents appear in quote details
Backend: Chat available for accepted status quotes
Backend: Messages persist in quote_messages collection
Frontend: Chat section visible on certification review page when quote status is 'accepted'
Frontend: Chat input field visible and functional
Frontend: Chat send button visible and functional
Frontend: Messages display correctly with sender name, role, and timestamp
Frontend: Pay button disabled with warning when no employer documents uploaded
Frontend: Warning message: 'Upload at least one document in Employer Documents above before paying'
Frontend: After uploading a document, pay button becomes enabled
Frontend: Document upload works via Employer Documents section
Frontend: Document deletion works correctly
Frontend: Chat polling refreshes messages (8s interval configured)
skipped_tests: Backend: test_reject_message_on_pending_quote - No pending quote available for testing
seed_data_creation: Test messages created in quote_messages collection during testing. Test document uploaded to restore quote state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat/Messaging and Payment Document Validation features fully tested. Key findings: 1) Chat section (ChatSection component) appears on certification review page for quotes with status in ['accepted', 'paid', 'delivered', 'resubmit_needed', 'validated']. 2) Chat uses polling every 8 seconds (not websockets). 3) Messages stored in quote_messages MongoDB collection. 4) Pay button is disabled when employer_documents array is empty, with warning message displayed. 5) Backend validates document upload before payment (returns 400 if no documents). 6) Robert Chen quote (ID: e7b48f80-bf47-402d-ab99-10054f1f8709) used for testing - status 'accepted'. Test messages exist in chat from both employer and actuary.
